title: Cookie Policy (UK)
paragraphs:
This Cookie Policy was last updated on July 30, 2025 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the United Kingdom.
1. Introduction
Our website,
https://www.sellmycartoday.uk
(hereinafter: "the website") uses cookies and other related technologies (for convenience all technologies are referred to as "cookies"). Cookies are also placed by third parties we have engaged. In the document below we inform you about the use of cookies on our website.
2. What are cookies?

A cookie is a small simple file that is sent along with pages of this website and stored by your browser on the hard drive of your computer or another device. The information stored therein may be returned to our servers or to the servers of the relevant third parties during a subsequent visit.
3. What are scripts?
A script is a piece of program code that is used to make our website function properly and interactively. This code is executed on our server or on your device.

A web beacon (or a pixel tag) is a small, invisible piece of text or image on a website that is used to monitor traffic on a website. In order to do this, various data about you is stored using web beacons.
5. Cookies
5.1 Technical or functional cookies

Some cookies ensure that certain parts of the website work properly and that your user preferences remain known. By placing functional cookies, we make it easier for you to visit our website. This way, you do not need to repeatedly enter the same information when visiting our website and, for example, the items remain in your shopping cart until you have paid. We may place these cookies without your consent.

We use statistics cookies to optimize the website experience for our users. With these statistics cookies we get insights in the usage of our website. We ask your permission to place statistics cookies.

Marketing/Tracking cookies are cookies or any other form of local storage, used to create user profiles to display advertising or to track the user on this website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
5.4 Social media

On our website, we have included content from Facebook and Instagram to promote web pages (e.g. “like”, “pin”) or share (e.g. “tweet”) on social networks like Facebook and Instagram. This content is embedded with code derived from Facebook and Instagram and places cookies. This content might store and process certain information for personalized advertising.

Facebook and Instagram are located in the United States.
6. Placed cookies

title: Thanks for asking Sellmycartoday.uk to value your Car
paragraphs: Thanks for asking Sellmycartoday.uk to value your Car
Your details have been sent to one of our vehicle purchasers who will get back to you soon. We try our best to be as fast as possible, but we also want to make sure it's the best price we can offer.
Despite our best endeavours, occasionally our email will go into your spam folder. Please check if you haven't heard from us.
Feel free to call us if you have any questions.

title: About Us
paragraphs: What types of vehicles are we interested in?

We are willing to settle any outstanding finance and will purchase vehicles lacking a valid MOT or in need of minor repairs. In essence, we are interested in all vehicles, including vans and commercial units, regardless of their age, make, model, or condition. We guarantee competitive valuations for any vehicles presented to us.

We are seeking late-model, low-mileage cars, including estates and sports cars that have had minimal ownership and a complete service history. However, we are open to considering all types of vehicles, including commercial ones.

SellMyCarToday's Vision & Mission
Our Visiion

What Sell My Car Today Believes in Our commitment is to provide a hassle-free experience to people who are desiring to sell their car or are merely looking for its valuation. Our tool is highly simplified and requires very little information to unlock the specifications of a vehicle. Commencing with registration number and mileage, our users can relish further data including manufacturing year, model and so much more. Also, we guarantee to provide competitive prices as well as apt customer service to guide our audience in every conceivable way. We accept all sorts of vehicles, including new and old ones, and have proved to be resourceful and reliable for everyone.
Our Mission

Sell My Car Today is shaping and revolutionizing its processes day by day to become more efficient for users. We are devising to become the best and most trusted resource for car valuations in the UK. Besides, we love to empower car owners and let them make informed decisions in terms of selling their vehicles or even buying one.

All the information we provide is highly accurate and unbiased, still, we are striving for its perfection and becoming a resource for up-to-the-minute data. To simplify the process even further, we are working on innovative solutions.

title: Sell My Car
paragraphs: Sell Your Car Today, Instantly & Effortlessly!
Are you seeking a professional car buying service?

Please provide the car registration number and mileage to receive a complimentary valuation within 30 seconds.
Value My Car


Just 3 steps and your work is done! Sell My Car Today values your time and patience, so we make your valuation and appointment booking as painless as possible.


Get rapid cash without the hassle! If you need to sell quickly, we’ve got you covered. We guarantee a prompt transfer of funds to your bank account once the amount is agreed upon.

No Hidden Costs

Transparency is at the core of our identity! We provide a clear valuation of your vehicle and arrange collection from your location, ensuring there are no hidden fees.
1000+
Cars Purchased
We provide super quick valuations just 30 seconds and we can buy your car in no time!
FAIR - WE TAKE PRIDE IN GIVING YOU EXCELLENT, COMPETITIVE PRICES!
NO OBLIGATION – REAL OFFERS WITH ZERO STRINGS ATTACHED!
FREE - ABSOLUTELY NO ADMIN FEES OF ANY KIND
Instant payment & same day collection.
Our availability for your help is 24/7.
Are you looking to sell your car quickly and without the hassle?

Let’s be real, selling a car can be tricky. Even those big names you see on TV aren’t always as easy to deal with as they seem. Many will come up with excuses to drastically lower their offers when you show up. Plus, when a deal is finally made, you might find yourself waiting several days for payment or facing costly bank fees.
We buy cars fast, and unless there’s a major issue, we’ll stick to our offer. You’ll get paid within minutes through a free same-day bank transfer—no hidden fees, no admin costs.
Opening your home to potential buyers can feel risky and uncertain. We can take that risk away while still offering you a fair price. you can trust that you’re in good hands right from the start.

I have question? Before Sell My Car
Why should I sell my car to SellMyCarToday.uk?

We make selling your car fast, safe, and stress-free. You get a free online valuation in seconds, a guaranteed price for 7 days, and instant payment when we collect your car. No hidden fees, no waiting around - just a simple, transparent process that puts you in control.
How is SellMyCarToday.uk different from other car-buying websites?

Unlike many big platforms, we combine the convenience of an instant online quote with the personal service of a local team. You deal directly with our friendly specialists — no automated lowball offers, no long auctions. We keep things clear, fair, and quick.
Will you buy my car even if it’s old or damaged?

Yes! We buy cars and vans of any age, mileage, or condition — from nearly new vehicles to those with high mileage or cosmetic damage. Simply enter your registration number and mileage to see your free valuation.
How do I get paid when I sell my car to you?

Payment is made instantly on collection — usually by secure bank transfer before we drive away. You’ll see the funds in your account before handing over the keys, so you can sell with total peace of mind.
Are there any fees or hidden costs?

No. Our valuations are 100% free, and collection is included anywhere in the UK. The price we quote is the price we pay — with no admin charges, no listing fees, and no deductions for minor wear and tear.

title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: This privacy policy has been compiled to better serve those who are concerned with how their ‘Personally Identifiable Information’ (PII) is being used online. PII, as described in US privacy law and information security, is information that can be used on its own or with other information to identify, contact, or locate a single person, or to identify an individual in context. Please read our privacy policy carefully to get a clear understanding of how we collect, use, protect or otherwise handle your Personally Identifiable Information in accordance with our website.
What personal information do we collect from the people who visit our website?

When the users subscribe to our newsletter, we collect their email addresses and their country of preference. When they submit the contact us form, we collect their full name, email address, mobile number, and country. When they submit the franchise form, we collect their full name, email address, and mobile number. Finally, when they submit the request a booking form, we collect their full name, email address, and mobile number.
When do we collect information?

We collect information from you when you subscribe to our newsletter, respond to a survey, fill out a form or enter information on our site, and when you provide us with feedback on our products or services.
How do we use your information?

We may use the information we collect from you when you sign up for our newsletter, respond to a survey or marketing communication, browse the website, or use certain other site features in the following ways:
To allow us to better service you in responding to your customer service requests.
To administer a contest, promotion, survey or another site feature.
To ask for ratings and reviews of services or products.
How do we protect your information?

Our website is scanned on a regular basis for security holes and known vulnerabilities in order to make your visit to our site as safe as possible.Your personal information is contained behind secured networks and is only accessible by a limited number of persons who have special access rights to such systems, and are required to keep the information confidential. In addition, all sensitive information you supply is encrypted via Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology.We implement a variety of security measures when a user enters, submits, or accesses their information to maintain the safety of your personal information.
Do we use ‘cookies’?

Yes. Cookies are small files that a site or its service provider transfers to your computer’s hard drive through your Web browser (if you allow) that enables the site’s or service provider’s systems to recognize your browser and capture and remember certain information. We also use cookies to help us compile aggregate data about site traffic and site interaction so that we can offer better site experiences and tools in the future.
We use cookies to:

Compile aggregate data about site traffic and site interactions in order to offer better site experiences and tools in the future. We may also use trusted third-party services that track this information on our behalf.You can choose to have your computer warn you each time a cookie is being sent, or you can choose to turn off all cookies. You can do this through your browser settings. Since browser is a little different, look at your browser’s Help Menu to learn the correct way to modify your cookies.If you turn cookies off, it won’t affect the user’s experience.

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your Personally Identifiable Information.
Third-party links

We do not include or offer third-party products or services on our website.
Google

We, along with third-party vendors such as Google use first-party cookies (such as the Google Analytics cookies) or other third-party identifiers to compile data regarding user interactions on the website.
Opting out
You can opt out by visiting the Network Advertising Initiative Opt Out page or by using the Google Analytics Opt Out Browser add on.

We agree to the following:
– Users can visit our site anonymously.
– Our Privacy Policy link includes the word ‘Privacy’ and can easily be found in our website’s footer menu.
You will be notified of any Privacy Policy changes on our Privacy Policy Page.
How does our site handle Do Not Track signals?
We honor Do Not Track signals and Do Not Track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track (DNT) browser mechanism is in place.
Does our site allow third-party behavioral tracking?
Yes. We use Google Analytics to track the users’ behavior on our website.
COPPA (Children Online Privacy Protection Act)

We do not specifically market to children under the age of 13 years old.We also agree to the Individual Redress Principle which requires that individuals have the right to legally pursue enforceable rights against data collectors and processors who fail to adhere to the law. This principle requires not only that individuals have enforceable rights against data users, but also that individuals have recourse to courts or government agencies to investigate and/or prosecute non-compliance by data processors.

TJ was great. I sent him a Whatsapp message late Monday afternoon. He replied to me in the evening, asked for some details and made a very good initial offer. He proposed a collection by midday the next day. He got there on the Tuesday as agreed, inspected the car, we renegotiated a little and agreed on a good final price for both.
He immediately made payment by instant bank transfer and then he dealt with the paperwork and helped me notify the sale to the DVLA online.
Overall, a very easy, clear and quick process.

If you want to sell your car, this is the best place.

If you’re looking to sell your car, don’t hesitate to give them a call — highly recommended.

Sell Your Car for the Best Price – Fast & Hassle-Free!

Want to sell your car fast and get the best cash offer? At
Sell My Car Today
, we make it effortless! Get a
fair and competitive price
for your car in just
30 seconds
with our instant valuation process.
Step 1:

Simply enter your vehicle registration number and vehicle mileage, then start the 30-second real-time car valuation process using the form above.
Step 2:

Using your car registration number, we instantly retrieve your vehicle’s details—including its make, model, and specifications—to deliver the most accurate real-time valuation for your car.
Last Step:
Sold! Done & Paid

We’ll come to you, anytime. Our agent will check your documents & car condition quickly and transfer payment instantly to your bank.
Just done!
Have a question? Find the answers fast in our FAQs!
How will you send me a quote/contact me?
Once you submit your car registration number and mileage, we instantly provide a valuation for both poor and good condition cars on your screen. To proceed, you must select a callback option.

After that, we’ll send you an email with all the important details about your vehicle for verification. Our Sell My Car Today agent will then contact you to discuss the next steps, inspect your car, and finalize the sale.
Will it cost me anything to get a quote?
No, getting a quote from Sell My Car Today is completely free! Simply enter your car registration number and mileage, and we’ll provide an instant valuation at no cost or obligation.
What happens after I have accepted the quotation?

Once you accept the quotation, here’s what happens next:
Agent Contact:
A Sell My Car Today agent will contact you to arrange a convenient time for car inspection and document verification.

Our agent will inspect your car and review the necessary paperwork.
Instant Payment:

Upon agreement, you’ll receive instant cash via bank transfer.
Car Collection:
We’ll pick up your car directly from your location.
It’s a quick, hassle-free process designed to get you the best deal with no hidden fees!
Do you buy vans and commercial vehicles?

Yes! We accept vans and commercial vehicles up to 3.5 tonnes as standard. If you have a larger vehicle, just get in touch by
call: 03337 729 283
, and we’ll provide you with a custom quote.
